SEA_GLASS.DOWNFALL-WATCHER.title: Oracle Glass
DOWNFALL-RIPPED_DOLL.title: Ripped Doll
DOWNFALL-RIPPED_DOLL.description: At the start of the first 2 turns of combat, [blue]Conjure[/blue].
DOWNFALL-RIPPED_DOLL.flavor: The last reminder of your prior self. It still holds latent magicks.
DOWNFALL-SHREDDED_DOLL.title: Shredded Doll
DOWNFALL-SHREDDED_DOLL.description:
A the start of your turn, [blue]Conjure[/blue].
The first time you refresh your Spells each combat, gain 1 [blue]Ritual[/blue].
DOWNFALL-SHREDDED_DOLL.flavor: A reminder of your weakness, and yet you still can't let go.
DOWNFALL-BRONZE_CORE.title: Bronze Core
DOWNFALL-BRONZE_CORE.description: The first time you create a Function each combat, gain {energyPrefix:energyIcons(1)}.
DOWNFALL-PLATINUM_CORE.title: Platinum Core
DOWNFALL-PLATINUM_CORE.description: The first 3 Functions you create each combat cost 0 until played.
DOWNFALL-BRONZE_GEAR.title: Bronze Gear
DOWNFALL-BRONZE_GEAR.description: At the start of each combat, gain {{C|Gear Up}}. Guardian starts the run with a random common Gem.
DOWNFALL-BRONZE_GEAR.flavor: Protection where you need it most.
DOWNFALL-EMERALD_TORCH.title: Emerald Torch
DOWNFALL-EMERALD_TORCH.flavor: The fires of greed never fade.
DOWNFALL-HEART_OF_GOO.title: Heart of Goo
DOWNFALL-HEART_OF_GOO.description: Whenever you Consume, heal 2 HP, up to 8 each combat.
DOWNFALL-MOB_LEADERS_STAFF.title: Mob Leader's Staff
DOWNFALL-MOB_LEADERS_STAFF.description: At the start of each combat, gain @GrE, draw 1 card, and Swap to the next Gremlin.
DOWNFALL-MOB_LEADERS_STAFF.flavor: Among gremlin mobs, the one with the best horn maintains complete command over the troupe, until another one manages to steal it.
DOWNFALL-SNECKO_SOUL.title: Snecko Soul
DOWNFALL-SNECKO_SOUL.description: At the start of each combat, add {{C|Soul Roll}} to your hand.
DOWNFALL-SPIRIT_BRAND.title: Spirit Brand
DOWNFALL-SPIRIT_BRAND.description: The first time you Ignite a Ghostflame each turn, gain 4 Block.
DOWNFALL-BAALORS_LORDLY_PLATE.title: Baalor's Lordly Plate
DOWNFALL-BAALORS_LORDLY_PLATE.flavor: One can never have enough armor.
DOWNFALL-BAG_OF_TRICKS.title: Bag of Tricks
DOWNFALL-BAG_OF_TRICKS.description: At the start of each combat, draw 2 Collected cards.
DOWNFALL-GOOP_DWELLER.title: Goop Dweller
DOWNFALL-GOOP_DWELLER.description: At the start of combat, Split into a Bruiser Slime.
DOWNFALL-GOOP_DWELLER.flavor: He followed me home. Can I keep it?
DOWNFALL-JAR_OF_TOBSCO.title: Jar of Tobsco
DOWNFALL-JAR_OF_TOBSCO.flavor: A little extra heat makes everything better.
DOWNFALL-LOADED_DIE.title: Loaded Die
DOWNFALL-LOADED_DIE.description: Whenever a card is Muddled, gain 1 Block.
DOWNFALL-PICK_OF_RHAPSODY.title: Pick of Rhapsody
DOWNFALL-PICK_OF_RHAPSODY.description: Whenever you defeat an Elite encounter, add a random Gem to the rewards.
DOWNFALL-PICK_OF_RHAPSODY.flavor: With as many gemstones that litter the Spire, it is hard to imagine anyone so unlucky to have needed this Pick to aid them.
DOWNFALL-PROTECTIVE_GOGGLES.title: Protective Goggles
DOWNFALL-PROTECTIVE_GOGGLES.description: If you end your turn with no Encoded cards, gain 4 Block.
DOWNFALL-RECYCLER.title: Recycler
DOWNFALL-RECYCLER.description: The first time a non-Status, non-Curse Ethereal card is Exhausted each combat, add a copy to your hand that costs 0 until played.
DOWNFALL-RECYCLER.flavor: One day, it shall be recycled too.
DOWNFALL-SEAL_OF_APPROVAL.title: Seal of Approval
DOWNFALL-SEAL_OF_APPROVAL.description: Upon pickup, choose 1 of 5 Uncommon Offclass {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Power|Powers}} to obtain.
DOWNFALL-SEAL_OF_APPROVAL.flavor: I'm The Ironclad and this is my favorite Relic in the Spire. -Merchant Advertising Pamphlet
DOWNFALL-SILVER_BULLET.title: Silver Bullet
DOWNFALL-SILVER_BULLET.description: At the start of each combat, add a copy of {{C|Piercing Shot}} to your hand. It costs 0.
DOWNFALL-SLIMY_SKULL.title: Slimy Skull
DOWNFALL-SLIMY_SKULL.description: Whenever you apply Goop, apply an additional 1 Goop.
DOWNFALL-SLIMY_SKULL.flavor: A Snecko skull in absolutely awful condition. Unclean and slimy, dirt and grime stick to it like glue.
DOWNFALL-STONE_OF_NOMAKK.title: Stone of Nomakk
DOWNFALL-STONE_OF_NOMAKK.description: At the start of combat, gain 1 Potency.
DOWNFALL-STONE_OF_NOMAKK.flavor: When presented to one of your Goop Gang, it seems to make the blob dance.
DOWNFALL-TOME_OF_PORTALMANCY.title: Tome of Portalmancy
DOWNFALL-WOUND_POKER.title: Wound Poker
DOWNFALL-WOUND_POKER.description: At the end of each turn, deal 4 damage to each Weakened enemy.
DOWNFALL-WOUND_POKER.flavor: Does it hurt when I do this?
DOWNFALL-BOTTLED_BLACK_HOLE.title: Bottled Black Hole
DOWNFALL-BOTTLED_BLACK_HOLE.description: Upon pickup, choose a card. Start each combat with this card in Stasis.
DOWNFALL-BOTTLED_BLACK_HOLE.flavor: Somewhere, something incredible is waiting to be known.
DOWNFALL-CABLE_SPOOL.title: Cable Spool
DOWNFALL-CABLE_SPOOL.description: Encode a copy of the first Encodable card you play each combat.
DOWNFALL-DESSICATED_HAND.title: Dessicated Hand
DOWNFALL-FRAGMENTATION_GRENADE.title: Fragmentation Grenade
DOWNFALL-FRAGMENTATION_GRENADE.descripti: Damage dealt to random enemies is increased by 3.
DOWNFALL-FRAGMENTATION_GRENADE.flavor: Nobody dares to ask where the Gremlin got it from.
DOWNFALL-IMPECCABLE_PECS.title: Impeccable Pecs
DOWNFALL-IMPECCABLE_PECS.description: Whenever you gain Strength, gain an equal amount of Temporary HP. Start each combat with 1 Strength.
DOWNFALL-JADE_RING.title: Jade Ring
DOWNFALL-JADE_RING.description: Enemies take 6 more damage from Doom.
DOWNFALL-JADE_RING.flavor: Jade is the symbol of honesty.
DOWNFALL-JEREMIAHS_BANNER.title: Jeremiah's Banner
DOWNFALL-JEREMIAHS_BANNER.description: At the start of combat, gain 1 Slime slot and Split into a random Slime.
DOWNFALL-MAGIC_MALLET.title: Magic Mallet
DOWNFALL-MAGIC_MALLET.description: Whenever you apply Weak, gain 1 Wiz, up to 3 times per turn.
DOWNFALL-OLEXAS_SHIELD.title: Olexa's Shield
DOWNFALL-OLEXAS_SHIELD.description: {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Power|Powers}} are counted towards the progression of Searing and Crushing Ghostflames.
DOWNFALL-PAPER_CROW.title: Paper Crow
DOWNFALL-PAPER_CROW.description: Enemies take 25% additional damage from Manaburn.
DOWNFALL-PAPER_CROW.flavor: Arbiter of doubt and curses folded one thousand times...
DOWNFALL-SLEEVED_ACE.title: Sleeved Ace
DOWNFALL-SLEEVED_ACE.description: At the start of each combat, gain a {{C|Marked Card|Marked Card+}}.
DOWNFALL-SOUL_LIT_LAMP.title: Soul-lit Lamp
DOWNFALL-SOUL_LIT_LAMP.description: Upon pickup, gain 3 Essence. At the start of combat, add an {{C|Ember}} into your hand.
DOWNFALL-SOUL_LIT_LAMP.flavor: A ghoulish decoration. The crackles of fire are replaced by buzzing wails.
DOWNFALL-WIZARD_HAT.title: Wizard Hat
DOWNFALL-WIZARD_HAT.description: Whenever you consume Wiz, remove a debuff at random.
DOWNFALL-WIZARD_HAT.flavor: The accompanying robes have long since been stolen.
DOWNFALL-ZETSUMEI.title: Zetsumei
DOWNFALL-ZETSUMEI.description: Every time you play 4 Spells in a combat, gain a {{C|Ceremony}}.
DOWNFALL-ZETSUMEI.flavor: A blade favored by mages due to its ability to channel casted magic back into itself.
DOWNFALL-BIRD_FACED_VASE.title: Bird-Faced Vase
DOWNFALL-BIRD_FACED_VASE.description: The first 4 times you play a {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Power|Power}} card each combat, heal 3 HP.
DOWNFALL-BIRD_FACED_VASE.flavor: This urn shows the crow god Mazaleth looking mischievous.
DOWNFALL-BOTTLED_BRAIN.title: Bottled Brain
DOWNFALL-BOTTLED_BRAIN.description: Upon pickup, Upgrade a card in your Collection. Start combats with it on top of your Collected pile.
DOWNFALL-CRESCENT_TALISMAN.title: Crescent Talisman
DOWNFALL-CRESCENT_TALISMAN.description: Upon pickup, choose a card that does NOT have Conjure, and add Conjure to it.
DOWNFALL-CRESCENT_TALISMAN.flavor: “Please, just... don't forget me. Even after I die.”
DOWNFALL-CRYO_CHAMBER.title: Cryo Chamber
DOWNFALL-CRYO_CHAMBER.description: At the start of each combat, gain 1 Stasis slot. Whenever a card enters Stasis, Upgrade it.
DOWNFALL-CRYO_CHAMBER.flavor: Things always seem better coming out than they did going in.
DOWNFALL-FINAL_RITES.title: Final Rites
DOWNFALL-FINAL_RITES.description: The first time you activate 3 Chant effects in a combat, gain 1 Ritual.
DOWNFALL-FINAL_RITES.flavor: I leave everything I own to my cat, Noodles. Goodbye, cruel world. XOXO Jouster
DOWNFALL-FROST_PRIMER.title: Frost Primer
DOWNFALL-FROST_PRIMER.description: All Functions you create gain Retain.
DOWNFALL-FROST_PRIMER.flavor: 22 ounces of the chemical compound Ar22, shelf life: 22 years. Best stored in a mahogany fridge.
DOWNFALL-GREMLIN_BOMB.title: Gremlin Bomb
DOWNFALL-GREMLIN_BOMB.description: Whenever a Gremlin dies, deal 30 damage to ALL enemies.
DOWNFALL-GREMLIN_BOMB.flavor: Gremlins have an uncanny knack for finding dangerous things. Sometimes, they even survive looting them.
DOWNFALL-GREMLIN_GRAVESTONE.title: Gremlin Gravestone
DOWNFALL-GREMLIN_GRAVESTONE.description: Dead Gremlins can be Resurrected at Rest Sites as a Free Action.
DOWNFALL-GREMLIN_GRAVESTONE.flavor: Where do gremlins go when they die? Not bloody far enough.
DOWNFALL-MALLET.title: Mallet
DOWNFALL-MALLET.description: At the start of each combat, add 2 copies of {{C|Fine Tuning|Fine Tuning+}} to your hand.
DOWNFALL-MALLET.flavor: That's it! I'm gettin me mallet!
DOWNFALL-RED_CANDLE.title: Red Candle
DOWNFALL-RED_CANDLE.description: Whenever you apply Soulburn, apply 2 additional Soulburn.
DOWNFALL-RING_OF_THE_SNEK.title: Ring of the Snek
DOWNFALL-RING_OF_THE_SNEK.description: Whenever you activate 3 Overflow effects, apply 1 Weak and Vulnerable to a random enemy.
DOWNFALL-SLIMED_TAIL.title: Slimed Tail
DOWNFALL-SLIMED_TAIL.flavor: A fake tail to trick enemies during combat, completely covered in slime.
DOWNFALL-SNEAKY_TEAKWOOD_MATCH.title: Sneaky Teakwood Match
DOWNFALL-SNEAKY_TEAKWOOD_MATCH.descripti: The first time you Ignite each turn, you can choose whether to Advance or Retract.
DOWNFALL-SOUL_STONE.title: Soul Stone
DOWNFALL-SOUL_STONE.description: Whenever you Exhaust 4 cards, Ignite the current Ghostflame.
DOWNFALL-SOUL_STONE.flavor: A soul would liven this thing up!
DOWNFALL-THIMBLE_HELM.title: Thimble Helm
DOWNFALL-THIMBLE_HELM.description: Start each combat with 3 Temporary HP. While you have Temporary HP, cards grant 1 additional Block.
DOWNFALL-THIMBLE_HELM.flavor: Worn by the Spire's miniest heroes.
DOWNFALL-UNIDENTIFIED_EGG.title: Unidentified Egg
DOWNFALL-UNIDENTIFIED_EGG.description: Whenever you add an Offclass card to your deck, Upgrade it. Upon pickup, Upgrade 2 random Offclass cards.
DOWNFALL-UNIDENTIFIED_EGG.flavor: What will hatch? Pay $1000 to see.
DOWNFALL-WIZARD_STAFF.title: Wizard Staff
DOWNFALL-WIZARD_STAFF.flavor: The pride and joy of every Gremlin Wizard, this staff is a frequent target of theft by rival mobs.
DOWNFALL-ZENER_DECK.title: Zener Deck
DOWNFALL-ZENER_DECK.description: At the start of combat, add {{C|ESP}} to your Spellbook and Conjure it.
DOWNFALL-ZENER_DECK.flavor: “One, two, three, all eyes should be on me.”
DOWNFALL-BOTTLED_CODE.title: Bottled Code
DOWNFALL-BOTTLED_CODE.description: Upon pickup, choose a card with Encode. Start each combat with this card Encoded.
DOWNFALL-BOTTLED_CODE.flavor: Actually, I have code for that exact thing...
DOWNFALL-EYE_OF_THE_OCCULT.title: Eye of the Occult
DOWNFALL-EYE_OF_THE_OCCULT.flavor: This gruesome carving imparts magical knowledge to its owner.
DOWNFALL-GREED_OOZE.title: Greed Ooze
DOWNFALL-GREED_OOZE.description: At the start of combat, spawn Greed Ooze (can be revived if Absorbed. At Rest Sites, Greed Ooze will take 50 of your souls, increasing its damage by 1.
DOWNFALL-GREED_OOZE.flavor: A friend found in the Spire who devours souls.
DOWNFALL-MYSTICAL_OCTAHEDRON.title: Mystical Octahedron
DOWNFALL-MYSTICAL_OCTAHEDRON.description: Upon pickup, choose a card that has an Overflow effect. Whenever you play it, gain 4 Block and activate its Overflow effect, even if you don't have more than 5 cards in hand.
DOWNFALL-MYSTICAL_OCTAHEDRON.flavor: It appears weighted toward one side.
DOWNFALL-QUANTUM_CHAMBER.title: Quantum Chamber
DOWNFALL-QUANTUM_CHAMBER.description: Upon pickup, choose a card. Start each combat with this card removed from your deck. At the start of your 4th turn, return it and 2 copies of it to your hand.
DOWNFALL-QUANTUM_CHAMBER.flavor: You get the chicken by hatching the egg, not by smashing it.
DOWNFALL-SCRAP_OOZE.title: Scrap Ooze
DOWNFALL-SCRAP_OOZE.description: At the start of combat, spawn Scrap Ooze (can be revived if Absorbed. At Rest Sites, you can donate a card to the Scrap Ooze, modifying its +1 damage for Uncommons +2 damage for Rares -1 damage for Commons -2 damage for {{QueryLink|Cards|type:Curse|Curses}}
DOWNFALL-THE_BROKEN_SEAL.title: The Broken Seal
DOWNFALL-THE_BROKEN_SEAL.description: Upon pickup, raise your Max HP by 6, then heal all of your HP. Start each combat with 1 Strength, Dexterity, and Intensity. You can not receive The Broken Seal and other seals again.
DOWNFALL-ABYSS_BLADE.title: Abyss Blade
DOWNFALL-ABYSS_BLADE.description: The first time you are Drained each turn, gain @AwE and draw a card.
DOWNFALL-BLACK_HEART_OF_GOO.title: Black Heart of Goo
DOWNFALL-BLACK_HEART_OF_GOO.description: Replaces {{R|Heart of Goo}}. Whenever you Consume, heal 3 HP, up to 15 each combat.
DOWNFALL-BLOCKED_CHAKRA.title: Blocked Chakra
DOWNFALL-BLOCKED_CHAKRA.description: Gain @CoE at the start of your turn. You don't draw from your Collected pile until your 4th turn.
DOWNFALL-BLOCKED_CHAKRA.flavor: One pulled muscle is all it takes.
DOWNFALL-ELECTROMAGNETIC_COIL.title: Electromagnetic Coil
DOWNFALL-ELECTROMAGNETIC_COIL.descriptio: Functions are now made up of 4 cards.
DOWNFALL-ELECTROMAGNETIC_COIL.flavor: An inefficient but entertaining power source.
DOWNFALL-GREMLIN_LEADERS_VOUCHER.title: Gremlin Leader's Voucher
DOWNFALL-GREMLIN_LEADERS_VOUCHER.descrip: Gain @GrE at the start of your turn. Upon pickup, permanently lose a Gremlin.
DOWNFALL-GUARDIAN_GEAR.title: Guardian Gear
DOWNFALL-GUARDIAN_GEAR.description: Replaces {{R|Bronze Gear}}. At the start of combat, gain {{C|Gear Up}}. Whenever you enter Defensive Mode, gain @GuE and draw 2 cards.
DOWNFALL-LIBRA.title: Libra
DOWNFALL-LIBRA.description: Choose any number of your Strikes and Defends to Transform into their opposite type.
DOWNFALL-LUCKY_HORSESHOE.title: Lucky Horseshoe
DOWNFALL-LUCKY_HORSESHOE.description: Upon pickup, choose 1 of 3 Characters. Choose 3 Upgraded Uncommon cards and 2 Rare cards to add to your deck. All combats drop an additional card reward of the chosen character's cards.
DOWNFALL-MAKESHIFT_BATTERY.title: Makeshift Battery
DOWNFALL-MAKESHIFT_BATTERY.description: Gain @AuE and add a {{C|Slimed}} into your discard pile at the start of your turn.
DOWNFALL-MARK_OF_THE_ETHER.title: Mark of the Ether
DOWNFALL-MARK_OF_THE_ETHER.description: Replaces {{R|Spirit Brand}}. Whenever you Ignite a Ghostflame, gain 4 Block.
DOWNFALL-MARK_OF_THE_ETHER.flavor: Let's see if we can do... better.
DOWNFALL-MOB_LEADERS_CROWN.title: Mob Leader's Crown
DOWNFALL-MOB_LEADERS_CROWN.description: Replaces {{R|Mob Leader's Staff}}. The first time you shuffle your draw pile each turn, gain @GrE, draw 1 card, and Swap to the next Gremlin.
DOWNFALL-MOB_LEADERS_CROWN.flavor: The fancier the symbol of office, the more likely it is to be stolen.
DOWNFALL-OBSIDIAN_SCALES.title: Obsidian Scales
DOWNFALL-OBSIDIAN_SCALES.description: At the start of combat, gain 3 Thorns. Whenever you are debuffed or gain a debuff, gain 1 Thorns.
DOWNFALL-OBSIDIAN_SCALES.flavor: Stain the sky black with your blood. Retaliate against all who struck out at you.
DOWNFALL-PRISMATIC_TORCH.title: Prismatic Torch
DOWNFALL-PRISMATIC_TORCH.description: Replaces {{R|Emerald Torch}}. At the start of each combat, add an {{C|Ember}} into your hand and gain 1 Reserve. The first time you Exhaust an {{C|Ember}} each turn, gain 1 Reserve.
DOWNFALL-PRISMATIC_TORCH.flavor: The ever-changing flames reflect fortune's favor.
DOWNFALL-SHORT_STATUE.title: Short Statue
DOWNFALL-SHORT_STATUE.description: The first time a Gremlin would die each combat, heal it to 75% of your Max HP instead.
DOWNFALL-SHORT_STATUE.flavor: It is surprising how well it works.
DOWNFALL-SNAKE_CHARMERS_FLUTE.title: Snake-Charmer's Flute
DOWNFALL-SUPER_SNECKO_SOUL.title: Super Snecko Soul
DOWNFALL-SUPER_SNECKO_SOUL.description: Replaces {{R|Snecko Soul}}. At the start of each combat and every other turn, gain a {{C|Soul Roll}}. On other turns, draws an additional card at the start of your turn and Muddles it.
DOWNFALL-TARR_BLOB.title: Tarr Blob
DOWNFALL-TARR_BLOB.description: Gain @SlE at the start of your turn. At the start of combat, lose 1 Slime slot.
DOWNFALL-WANDER_BOTS.title: Wander Bots
DOWNFALL-WANDER_BOTS.description: At the start of each combat, lose 1 Stasis slot. Gain @GuE at the start of your turn.
DOWNFALL-WANDER_BOTS.flavor: These drones find the most wonderful salvage, but require processing power to maintain.
DOWNFALL-WHITE_RIBBON.title: White Ribbon
DOWNFALL-WHITE_RIBBON.description: Whenever you play a card with a Chant effect, gain 3 Block, even if it is not active.
DOWNFALL-WHITE_RIBBON.flavor: Gives power to spoken words even without proper ritual.
DOWNFALL-XANATOS_ICY_CHARM.title: Xanatos' Icy Charm
DOWNFALL-XANATOS_ICY_CHARM.description: Gain @HxE at the start of your turn. Start each combat with 1 less Intensity, and receive no Intensity from the Inferno Ghostflame.
DOWNFALL-DONUS_WASHERS.title: Donu's Washers
DOWNFALL-DONUS_WASHERS.description: At the start of combat, gain @AuE @AuE and add 1 {{C|Void}} into your draw pile.
DOWNFALL-DONUS_WASHERS.flavor: It is rather clear why Donu collects these.
DOWNFALL-KRAMPIAN_COAL.title: Krampian Coal
DOWNFALL-KRAMPIAN_COAL.description: When you would draw from an empty Collected pile, add a {{C|Lucky Wick}} to your hand.
DOWNFALL-KRAMPIAN_COAL.flavor: "Intriguing! But why only specific chimneys?" - Ranwid
DOWNFALL-MANABOMB.title: Manabomb
DOWNFALL-MANABOMB.description: Whenever an enemy dies, transfer any Manaburn it has to a random enemy.
DOWNFALL-PILOTS_CODEX.title: Pilot's Codex
DOWNFALL-PILOTS_CODEX.description: At the end of your first 3 turns, if your Stasis slots aren't full, choose 1 of 3 cards to place into Stasis.
DOWNFALL-PILOTS_CODEX.flavor: Designs and diagrams of the Spire's earliest manually-driven prototypes, by Master Pilot David.
DOWNFALL-PROTECTIVE_GEAR.title: Protective Gear
DOWNFALL-PROTECTIVE_GEAR.description: Reduce the damage you take from Tackles by 3.
DOWNFALL-PROTECTIVE_GEAR.flavor: The best defense is a good offense.
DOWNFALL-RARE_BOOSTER_BOX.title: Rare Booster Box
DOWNFALL-RARE_BOOSTER_BOX.description: Upon pickup, obtain an Offclass Rare card.
DOWNFALL-SACK_OF_GEMS.title: Sack of Gems
DOWNFALL-SACK_OF_GEMS.description: Upon pickup, you may choose up to 5 random Gems to add to your deck.
DOWNFALL-SOUL_OF_CHAOS.title: Soul of Chaos
DOWNFALL-SOUL_OF_CHAOS.description: At the start of your turn, move to a random Ghostflame and randomize it. At the end of your turn, play the top card of your draw pile.
DOWNFALL-STOLEN_MERCHANDISE.title: Stolen Merchandise
DOWNFALL-STOLEN_MERCHANDISE.description: Whenever you Swap, gain an Echo of a random Colorless card. At the start of combat, the Merchant gains 2 Strength.
DOWNFALL-TAG_TEAMWORK.title: Tag Teamwork
DOWNFALL-THE_CONTRACT.title: The Contract
DOWNFALL-CHAMPIONS_CROWN.title: Champion's Crown
DOWNFALL-CHAMPIONS_CROWN.description: Once per combat, you may enter a Stance you are not in.
DOWNFALL-BERSERKERS_GUIDE.title: Berserker's Guide
DOWNFALL-BERSERKERS_GUIDE.description: At the start of your turn, gain 3 Vigor.
DOWNFALL-DEFENSIVE_THESIS.title: Defensive Thesis
DOWNFALL-DEFENSIVE_THESIS.description: Defensive Stance's Finisher Bonus grants 3 more Block.
DOWNFALL-GLADIATORS_MANUAL.title: Gladiators Manual
DOWNFALL-GLADIATORS_MANUAL.description: Whenever you play a Combo, a Finisher, and enter a Stance in the same turn, gain 1 Strength and Dexterity.
DOWNFALL-SIGNATURE_FINISHER.title: Signature Finisher
DOWNFALL-SIGNATURE_FINISHER.description: Upon pickup, choose a Finisher. This Finisher costs 0, can be used without a Stance, and never causes your Stance to be exited.
DOWNFALL-SIGNATURE_FINISHER.flavor: And now, it's time for my ULTIMATE MOVE!
DOWNFALL-SPECTRES_HAND.title: Spectre's Hand
DOWNFALL-SPECTRES_HAND.description: Whenever you enter a Stance, gain an Echo of a basic Strike or Defend. It costs 0.
DOWNFALL-BLACK_KNIGHTS_HELM.title: Black Knight's Helm
DOWNFALL-BLACK_KNIGHTS_HELM.description: The first time you enter each Stance each combat: Defensive: Gain 2 Dexterity and lose 1 Strength. Berserker: Gain 2 Strength and lose 1 Dexterity.
DOWNFALL-INNER_STRENGTH.title: Inner Strength
DOWNFALL-INNER_STRENGTH.flavor: It's about the gigantic sword in your heart.
DOWNFALL-AMULET_OF_UNYIELDING.title: Amulet of Unyielding
DOWNFALL-AMULET_OF_UNYIELDING.descriptio: Whenever you spend Vigor, gain 1 Strength for every 8 Vigor spent.
DOWNFALL-AMULET_OF_UNYIELDING.flavor: Strength once thought fleeting flows through you as if it had always been there.
DOWNFALL-POWER_ARMOR.title: Power Armor
DOWNFALL-POWER_ARMOR.description: Gain @ChE at the start of your turn. Your maximum Vigor and Counter is 10.
DOWNFALL-VICTORIOUS_CROWN.title: Victorious Crown
DOWNFALL-VICTORIOUS_CROWN.description: Replaces {{R|Champion's Crown}}. The first time you play a Finisher each turn, draw 2 cards and enter a random Stance.
DOWNFALL-VICTORIOUS_CROWN.flavor: Conglaturation!! You are the greatest winner.
DOWNFALL-DOLPHINS_STYLE_GUIDE.title: Dolphin's Style Guide
DOWNFALL-DOLPHINS_STYLE_GUIDE.descriptio: If you end your turn while in no Stance, draw 1 additional card next turn.
DOWNFALL-DOLPHINS_STYLE_GUIDE.flavor: Author: Renowned explorer and pugilist Dolphin K. Mist.
